title: Fix Prism Analysis Issues
description: Remediation plan for 6 issues found in Full Prism analysis of Axolotl codebase

tasks.title: Replace string-containment dependency detection with AST-based resolution
tasks.description: createDependencies() uses astBody.contains() for dependency detection, producing false positives and missing method-level/transitive deps. Replace with JavaParser-based ImportDeclaration resolution + type resolution.
steps: 1. Create new class AstDependencyResolver using JavaParser's ImportDeclaration and TypeResolution
2. Build a Map<qualifiedName, CodeClass> registry from all loaded classes
3. For each class, resolve imports to qualified names and match against registry
4. Also resolve method body types (parameter types, return types, local variable types, method call targets)
5. Add transitive dependency computation: if A→B and B→C, then A→C
6. Replace createDependencies() body with AstDependencyResolver calls
7. Add unit tests with known dependency chains

tasks.title: Fix token estimation and truncation in ContextCurationService
tasks.description: Token estimation uses 0.25 chars/token (4 chars/token) which underestimates for Java code. Substring truncation at 100 chars produces broken fragments.
steps: 1. Change TOKEN_PER_CHAR from 0.25 to 0.33 (3 chars/token — better for mixed code+english)
2. Add safety margin: multiply estimated tokens by 1.2 when code-heavy content detected
3. Replace arbitrary 100-char truncation with token-aware truncation: walk backward from maxChars to nearest syntactic boundary (newline, semicolon, closing brace)
4. Add a post-check: if actual output exceeds budget, trim last entity and log a warning
5. Consider using tiktoken or a simple regex tokenizer for accurate counting

tasks.title: Eliminate dual storage of schema properties in Neo4jSchemaRepository
tasks.description: Schema properties stored as both node properties AND inside JSON blob (data field). Timestamps can diverge silently.
steps: 1. Option A (preferred): Use JSON blob as single source of truth — remove s.name, s.userId, s.workspaceId, s.createdAt, s.updatedAt from Cypher queries, always read from deserialized data
2. Option A continued: Update save() to only set s.data, not individual properties
3. Add a consistency check method that compares node properties against JSON blob fields and logs discrepancies
4. Add migration script for existing data: re-save all schemas to sync node properties with blob

tasks.title: Improve hash truncation safety and add collision detection
tasks.description: 16-char hash truncation (64 bits) with no collision handling.
steps: 1. Increase truncation from 16 to 24 hex chars (96 bits) — reduces collision probability to negligible
2. Alternatively: keep 16 chars but add secondary verification by qualifiedName when hashes match
3. Add a collision-detection utility method that warns if two different entities produce same hash
4. Add integration test importing a large synthetic codebase (>10K entities) and verifying zero collisions

tasks.title: Add body-content relevance for method search in ContextCurationService
tasks.description: Method relevance calculation ignores body and return type.
steps: 1. Add body parameter to calculateRelevance(String query, CodeMethod m)
2. Check method body and return type against query tokens with lower weight (0.1 each)
3. Update CodeMethodRepository.findByBodyContaining() usage to pass body content to relevance scorer
4. Verify existing tests still pass

tasks.title: Resolve WorkflowSchema naming collision between model and graph packages
tasks.description: Two classes named WorkflowSchema in different packages causing cognitive overhead.
steps: 1. Rename graph model to GraphWorkflowSchema or consolidate into single model package
2. Update all imports referencing the renamed class
3. Verify no reflection-based code breaks

tasks.title: Handle self-referential dependency graph (meta-circular issue)
tasks.description: The codebase loader imports its own source code as CodeClass nodes, creating self-referential cycles. No mechanism distinguishes 'analyzed code' from 'analysis tool'.
steps: 1. Add configurable exclusion list to CodebaseLoader (exclude com.agent.orchestrator.graph.*, com.agent.orchestrator.config.*, etc.)
2. Or: tag imported classes with a 'source=tool' metadata flag when they come from the Axolotl project itself
3. Add cycle detection in createDependencies() to prevent infinite self-referential loops
4. Document which packages are user-code vs tool-code in the README
